name: What's the deadline to report my warehouse injury in Sandy Utah?

mainEntity.name: What's the deadline to report my warehouse injury in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report immediately; Utah allows up to 180 days but delays hurt claims badly.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah requires reporting workplace injuries to your employer as soon as practicable, ideally immediately, with a formal 180-day limit for claims.[1][2] Delays beyond immediate notice complicate proof and credibility.[1] Key factors: (1) No case benefits from not reporting; (2) Employer won't report? Use Labor Commission; (3) Late reports risk denial for lack of documentation; (4) Track exact date reported.[1][2] Note the injury date now, report today, and save proof like emails. Time-sensitive—act fast to protect benefits.

description: Report immediately; Utah allows up to 180 days but delays hurt claims badly.[1][2]
